---
title: "Week 5 class notes"
subtitle: "IBM 3202"
author: "Mikaela Gallardo"
date: today
format: 
    html:
        toc: true
        toc-depth: 3
        toc-locations: right-body
        number-sections: true
        code-line-numbers: true
        cold-fold: false
        code-link: true
        embed-resources: true
execute:
  freeze: auto
  warning: false
  error: true
---

# Class Overview

# Assignment Deadline Adjustment
